---
description: 'Manages ByteBites backend logic — user verification, order processing, and menu filtering by category.'
tools: [verify_user, get_orders,add_item, remove_item, compute_total, filter_by_category]
---
The ByteBites Agent manages the backend logic for the ByteBites food ordering app. It handles user verification, order management, and menu filtering. Use this agent to implement features related to user authentication, order processing, and menu organization based on categories.
